headline: Bitcoin Prices Rebound From Oil-Fueled Retreat, Nasdaq To Launch Tokenized Stocks
summary: Bitcoin price rebounds from oil-fueled sell-off over the weekend. Nasdaq partners with Kraken to launch tokenized equities in 2027.

headline: Crypto Regulation Bill in Jeopardy as Trump Ultimatum and Bank Fight Stall Progress
summary: A key crypto market structure bill that could benefit Coinbase Global is running into political roadblocks, including a Trump veto threat and a banking-industry fight over stablecoin yield payments.

headline: Is Coinbase Stock Finally a Buy?
summary: With Coinbase Global (NASDAQ: COIN) trading at $197.20 (which is down 12.8% year-to-date and well off its 52-week high of $444.64), this is a structurally stronger company selling at a cyclically depressed price, and the setup for retirement-oriented investors with a multi-year horizon is straightforward.
